candidates.row_label: Long Term Debt Maturing within 1 Year
candidates.why: Current portion of long-term debt excluding lease-related amounts; strong match for STD.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Even cleaner explicit current debt excluding leases; best match for baseline STD in years where present.

final_choice.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases
Long Term Debt Maturing within 1 Year

variables.notes: Priority list provided because labels vary over time. Both represent current portion of debt excluding leases; downstream should use the first available label, not sum both in the same period. Lease-related rows were excluded.
